rows.purpose: Supporting Action snapshot market feed used for fallback market rows and Action feature construction.
rows.explanation: Raw snapshot source; not rendered directly in bettor-facing explanations.

rows.purpose: Game-level weather context attached to canonical games.
rows.explanation: Use updated/source_updated_at for trust. Older generated_at reflects source weather history, not current attachment freshness.

rows.purpose: Action/sharp feature table built from snapshot data.
rows.explanation: Sharp/steam/expert/pro-system signals are used. Public bet% and money% are loaded here but not used in the current ranker model.

rows.purpose: Ranked daily board before policy filtering.
rows.explanation: Board-ranking surface before live/challenger policy cuts are applied.

rows.purpose: Policy-selected ranker bets by board date.
rows.explanation: This is the table that turns model outputs into official live and challenger cards.

rows.purpose: Public explanation layer for selected live bets.
rows.explanation: Bettor-readable explanation artifact. Explains selection; does not drive it.
This table proves exactly which features the ranker model actually sees.

rows.purpose: Predicted probabilities and edges for every scored row.
rows.explanation: Live and challenger differ after this table at the policy layer, not at the model layer.

rows.purpose: Canonical game results used for training targets and public performance grading.
rows.explanation: Not part of same-day pick selection, but required for training targets and public record grading.

rows.purpose: Canonical game identity and start-time table.
rows.explanation: Provides canonical matchup identity and start times.

rows.purpose: Joined research-ready surface attaching Action, weather, baseball, bullpen-role, lineup, and microstructure fields.
rows.explanation: This surface contains both used features and extra loaded context that is not yet part of the ranker model.

rows.purpose: Canonical betting-row surface that defines the boardable market universe.
rows.explanation: This is the actual row universe for live and challenger selection.

rows.purpose: Baseball context layer including starter/bullpen/statcast aggregates.
rows.explanation: Only a subset of loaded baseball fields is currently modeled; richer role/form fields remain context-only or unused.
